class Solution:
    def strWithout3a3b(self, a: int, b: int) -> str:
test:
def _same_unordered(actual, expected):
    return sorted(actual) == sorted(expected)

def _valid_di_string(actual, pattern):
    if not isinstance(actual, list) or sorted(actual) != list(range(len(pattern) + 1)):
        return False
    return all(
        (char == "I" and actual[index] < actual[index + 1])
        or (char == "D" and actual[index] > actual[index + 1])
        for index, char in enumerate(pattern)
    )

def _valid_restore(actual, adjacent_pairs):
    if not isinstance(actual, list) or len(actual) != len(adjacent_pairs) + 1:
        return False
    expected = Counter(frozenset(pair) for pair in adjacent_pairs)
    produced = Counter(
        frozenset((actual[index], actual[index + 1]))
        for index in range(len(actual) - 1)
    )
    return produced == expected

def _valid_no_triples(actual, a, b):
    return (
        isinstance(actual, str)
        and len(actual) == a + b
        and actual.count("a") == a
        and actual.count("b") == b
        and "aaa" not in actual
        and "bbb" not in actual
    )

def check(candidate):
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=10, b=10), 10, 10)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=6, b=4), 6, 4)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=7, b=7), 7, 7)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=4, b=1), 4, 1)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=4, b=6), 4, 6)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=1, b=2), 1, 2)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=5, b=5), 5, 5)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=5, b=2), 5, 2)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=2, b=2), 2, 2)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=3, b=3), 3, 3)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=33, b=67), 33, 67)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=33, b=34), 33, 34)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=30, b=25), 30, 25)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=100, b=100), 100, 100)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=30, b=30), 30, 30)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=20, b=30), 20, 30)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=25, b=25), 25, 25)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=20, b=20), 20, 20)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=50, b=51), 50, 51)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=33, b=33), 33, 33)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=15, b=15), 15, 15)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=45, b=55), 45, 55)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=35, b=40), 35, 40)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=7, b=3), 7, 3)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=25, b=30), 25, 30)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=34, b=33), 34, 33)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=51, b=50), 51, 50)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=30, b=20), 30, 20)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=40, b=60), 40, 60)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=50, b=50), 50, 50)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=3, b=7), 3, 7)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=60, b=40), 60, 40)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=20, b=15), 20, 15)
    assert _valid_no_triples(candidate(a=55, b=45), 55, 45)
